arts.ttl: Emi Buendia transfer update as Unai Emery makes stance clear amid River Plate interest
arts.sum: Unai Emery says Emi Buendia could leave Aston Villa in the winter window given his lack of game time this season. The 28-year-old is yet to start a league game this season and has only been introduced off the bench before the 80th minute on two occasions, against Newcastle United and Leicester City in recent weeks.
